title: Mesembryanthemum latens
taxonomy: Mesembryanthemum latens is a species of flowering plant in the ice plant family, Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Mesembryanthemum and is a succulent plant. The classification of Mesembryanthemum latens is further supported by its placement within the tribe Ruschieae, which is a group of succulent plants. The plant's classification is also influenced by its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower color. The specific classification of Mesembryanthemum latens is as follows: family - Aizoaceae, genus - Mesembryanthemum, species - M. latens.
